security_proposition: The spooler DLL loads establish exploitation of the print service.

attack_category.category: Exploitation of Remote Services false-positive surface

source_provenance.scenario: not authoritatively linkable at event level

excluded: all _source.rule fields, including detector description, severity, and ATT&CK mapping
Sysmon RuleName and system.message copies that contain ATT&CK labels
source agent names, IP addresses, and local account names
condition, verdict, severity, action, and upstream scenario identity

differentiation: No frozen counter case uses signature-verified standard Windows print-driver module loads.
